draft_tests.name: Set offline evaluation plan our prem - multi-turn
draft_tests.query: Set up an offline evaluation plan for our on-prem healthcare triage assistant. We can’t send prompts or outputs to external APIs, but we still need deterministic regression checks before the April 15 release. What’s the best approach?
draft_tests.rationale: Turn 1: Set up an offline evaluation plan for our on-prem healthcare → Turn 2: Can you give me a concrete folder structure and sample JSON

draft_tests.name: Langchain based sales assistant started promising
draft_tests.query: My LangChain-based sales assistant started promising discounts it isn’t authorized to offer. I need a monitoring and regression-testing strategy that will catch this kind of drift before production, with examples of high-risk test cases we should baseline.

draft_tests.name: Upgraded our internal agent gpt claude
draft_tests.query: We upgraded our internal agent from GPT-4.1 to Claude 3.7 Sonnet on March 12, and now some sessions still return 200 but seem to take different tool paths. Help me figure out whether these are harmless differences or real regressions that should block release.
draft_tests.rationale: Observed tool path: search_pain_history -> search_pain_history -> get_collection_results

gaps: Discovered but not exercised: invoke_invoke_post, health_health_get
No refusal or safety path observed.

resolved_gaps: No multi-turn completion path observed after clarification.
